Unlocks your company's knowledge and enables powerful work AI for everyone.

The Glean browser extension unlocks your company’s knowledge and enables powerful work AI for everyone. Just hit Command + J or Alt + J on Windows to instantly access Glean from anywhere:

💡 Know what your company knows, instantly with the Glean sidebar
* Discover: Glean delivers personalized content recommendations tailored to your current work context, surfacing relevant insights without you having to search.
* Chat: Ask questions and get instant answers from an AI Assistant that understand both your current content and your entire company knowledge base.
* Search: Find exactly what you need with intelligent search that understands context, connects related information, and identifies relevant experts.
* With a simple Command + J on Mac or Alt + J on Windows - instantly summarize information from any work application

⚡️ Get quick access to the work resources you need.
* Glean’s new tab page puts all of your company’s knowledge at your fingertips
* See recommended documents, notifications from across applications, access calendar events, and more.
* Use Glean’s Go Links feature to instantly access even the most complex URLs

—

Glean connects with dozens of popular workplace apps like Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, Slack, and more. Use this extension if you have an account created by your company admin.

Questions? Visit https://help.glean.com or learn more at https://www.glean.com

Learn more about the permissions we ask for: https://help.glean.com/en/articles/3643260-why-does-the-chrome-extension-ask-for-those-permissions

Nami is a browser-based, non-custodial wallet extension for interacting with the Cardano blockchain. It allows users to send and store multiple assets, delegate ADA, and more.

Nami is now part of the Lace family, bringing enhanced security and robust infrastructure to its users. As we integrated Nami into Lace in December 2024, we’re excited to introduce Nami Mode in Lace.

Nami Mode offers the familiar look and feel of Nami, fully supported by Lace’s advanced features, stability, and security. While you can continue to use Nami Mode for now, in the future Nami will be a full migration tool, only supporting the transition to Lace.
 
Try Nami Mode by downloading the Lace extension from the Chrome Store. Open the extension to continue your migration journey and experience Nami Mode supported by Lace. Transition today!

Transform your messy bookmarks into a stunning, personalized new tab page! The elegant way to organize and access your favorites.

📚 Stop spending time tweaking your homepage, start organizing your bookmarks!

Your bookmark collection is a unique treasure. BoTab helps you organize it effortlessly, making your bookmarks more valuable. This browser extension redefines your new tab page, breathing new life into your bookmarks and helping you better organize and access your valuable web resources.

✨ Smart Organization & Display
- Multiple card types for intuitive bookmark management
- Multi-column layout transforms bookmarks into an efficient kanban board
- Quick directory for easy folder navigation
- Powerful search and sorting capabilities

🔄 Browser Support
- Compatible with Chrome, Edge, Firefox and other major browsers
- Easy sharing with link and QR code generation

🎨 Ultimate Personalization
- Rich theme selection (Group, Meteor, Landscape, etc.)
- Custom wallpaper support for both local and online images
- Adjustable layouts and display options
- Custom CSS support for complete personalization
- Multiple display effects for different scenarios

🔒 Strict Privacy Protection
- Full compliance with Manifest V3 specifications
- All data stored locally, no sensitive information uploaded
- Acts only as a bookmark "porter", records no information
- Strict permission control, no remote code loading

⚡ Efficient User Experience
- Keyboard shortcuts support
- Smart search suggestions
- Bookmark import/export functionality
- Clean and intuitive interface design
- Multi-select feature for batch management

Arc Browser (Spotlight)-like experience for your URL bar, including auto-complete, history, bookmarks and more

🔍 Arcify Spotlight: Arc Browser's Spotlight Search for Chrome

Bring the powerful spotlight search experience from Arc Browser to Chrome. Navigate your tabs, bookmarks, and history instantly with a beautiful overlay search bar — no more clicking through endless tabs.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

✨ Key Features

⌨️ Keyboard-First Navigation
• Alt+L — Open spotlight on current tab
• Alt+T — Open spotlight in new tab
• Arrow keys to navigate results
• Enter to select, Escape to close

🔎 Smart Search
• Search across ALL open tabs instantly
• Find bookmarks without opening the manager
• Access browsing history with fuzzy matching
• Auto-complete suggestions as you type

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🤝 Works with the Arcify extension

Arcify Spotlight is the perfect companion to the Arcify sidebar extension. Use Arcify for vertical tab management and spaces, use Spotlight for quick navigation.
- https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/arcify-arc-like-vertical/ghbflkcnhdpkmbbdoflmemnifphjehec

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

⚙️ Update default shortcuts to use spotlight

1. Go to chrome://extensions/shortcuts
2. Find "Arcify Spotlight"
3. Set your preferred shortcuts:
   • macOS: ⌘+L (current tab), ⌘+T (new tab)
   • Windows: Ctrl+L (current tab), Ctrl+T (new tab)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Questions or feedback? Visit our GitHub repository: https://github.com/phulsechinmay/arcify-spotlight.
A temporary bookmark focuses on reading later, rather than closing and removing, with several Vim keybindings!

Please check https://github.com/willbchang/chrome-read-later#readme for a better document. This page will automatically show up after installation.

Features
• Reading List
  •  Reading Progress: It saves the reading progress of current page.
  •  Sync in Cloud: Sync across Chrome browsers with one google account.
  •  Local History: Save the reading list history locally.
• Status Bar
  •  Row Number : Total Count
  •  History Icon: Click to on/off history mode.
  •  Export Icon: Click to export reading list to JSONL text/file.
  •  Import Icon: Click to import reading list from JSONL text/file.
  •  Options Icon: Click to open options page.
  •  Question Icon: Click to open the documentation & feedback page.

Usages

| Mac Keyboard | Windows Keyboard |
|------------------------+--------------------------------|
|       Control       |               Ctrl               |
|       Option        |                Alt                |
|    Command    |         Windows            |
|       Delete        |        Backspace          |


• Mouse Click
  • Current Page:
    •  Right Click current page and select Read Later in context menus to save page info and close current tab.
    •  Right Click a link and select Read Later in context menus to save the target link info.
    •  Click the Read Later icon to open the Reading List(Popup Window).

  • Reading List(Popup Window):
    •  Mouse Hover:                show full title and link.
    •  Mouse Hover(image):  show the delete icon.
    •  Click:                               open link in current tab.
    •  Click(image):                 delete current link.
    •  Alt + Click:         open link in a new tab.
    •  Command + Click:         open link in a new tab and stay in current tab, and keep reading list.

• Keyboard Shortcuts
  • Current Page:
    •  Alt + Shift + S:            Save to reading list.
    •  Alt + Shift + Z:            Zoom In/Out reading list.

If you pressed the shortcuts and it didn't work, please enter chrome://extensions/shortcuts in your address bar.
Find Read Later and set the shortcuts(resolve the keyboard shortcuts conflicts)

  • Reading List(Popup Window):
    •  ↑:                               move to previous link.
    •  ↓:                               move to next link.
    •  Delete:                      delete current link.
    •  Command + z:         restore a deletion.
    •  Enter:                        open select link in current tab.
    •  Alt + Enter:               update link in a new tab.
    •  Command + Enter: open link in a new tab and stay in current tab, and keep reading list.

  • For Vim user(Popup Window):
    •  Esc:     close reading list.
    •  j:           move to next link.
    •  k:          move to previous link.
    •  gg:       move to the first link.
    •  G:         move to the last link.
    •  o:         open select link in current tab.
    •  O:         open link in a new tab and stay in current tab with reading list stay.
    •  dd:       delete current link.
    •  u:          restore a deletion.
    •  yy:        copy current link.
    •  ,:           open option page.
    •  ?:          open documentation & feedback site.
Desaturate the favicons of all inactive tabs.

Favicons—originally “favorites icons”—are the small icons that appear next to the page title inside a tab in Google Chrome.

Many companies choose to utilize this icon as a way to show off their logo or brand. As such, they’re often colorful and bold.

In an effort to provide a more minimalist, distraction-free, browsing experience, this extension desaturates the tab icons for all but the active tab.

In other words, all of the background tabs will appear in grayscale (“black and white”). When you switch which tab you’re viewing, the tab you were just viewing will see its icon switch to grayscale, and the new one you’re viewing will go back to full color.

The extension has no settings. There’s nothing to do. Just install it and it’ll start working right away. If you ever want the full color of icons to return, simply uninstall the extension.

Sharp Tabs v3 - Best Open Source All-in-1 Tabs Manager (Vertical & Pop-up)!
Fully Free. Vertical Tabs. Instant Search. Advanced Suspend. AI Organize. Auto Session Backups. Duplicates. Workspaces. Much More!

You can use all the features in the pop up mode or in the sidebar mode! Has every tab management feature you can dream of while being very light and performant.

Please try it out, you won't regret it!

🚨🚨 2026-01-30: Great News 🚨🚨
🔊 Sharp Tabs is now free and fully open-source. 
Support & contributions appreciated to continue working on it but totally optional 😇

⭐ All I ask is that you please star the repo on github.com/maddada/sharptabs ⭐

Other big changes in v3
✅ Removed sharptabs.com/restore based tabs suspension to reduce required permissions, now only native tabs suspension is available.
✅ Reduced the requested permissions as much as possible to the bare minimum required.
✅ Removed all anonymous tracking for enabled settings.
✅ Made all features fully free and not require account. Only features that do require are AI based features (AI auto group, AI auto clean, AI auto group name) but you can add your own Gemini key to use these too!

====

Almost all of the extension's features are free and don't even require signing in.
You're welcome to use it for free as long as you like 😇
Please support me if you really like Sharp Tabs.

Learn more here: sharptabs.com/free-vs-paid

🏆 Why Sharp Tabs is better than all of the other tab management UIs and extensions:

• Focused on the most intuitive UX and design.
• Every swipe, action, and click was tuned over months of usability testing.
• Brings the best features from many extensions into 1.
• Lightweight and performant. Made with the latest tech and best practices.
• Highly customizable and theme-able to fit any set up.

⭐ Highlights:
• Comes with insanely fast and easy to use tabs search
• Speeds you pc by using the best tab suspending mechanism (with screenshot)
• Intelligent auto session back ups so you never lose your tabs & tab groups
• Awesome keyboard hotkeys for power users
• Recent Tabs Navigation (like Alt + Tab but for browser tabs!)
• AI Auto Group. AI Auto Cleanup. Auto Group Naming.
• Workspaces feature to organize tabs into different areas (Personal, Work, etc.)
• 2 modes: Popup for quick actions, Sidebar for more involved usage
• 1 click to show duplicate tabs so you can close them
• Easily select + drag & drop multiple tabs
• Fully theme it to look exactly how you like
• Awesome bulk opener functionality to open tens of Jira, Linear, TestRail or other ids in 1 go.

🚀 Recent Updates: 

2026-02-16: v3.1.0
• Extension is now open source. Also made all features free.
• Fixed compact tabs where enter/space wouldn't select them
• Fixed issue with discord's favicon not appearing
• Fixed issue with 

2026-01-23:
• Added a fully featured bulk links opener in the menu (click 3 dots in the top bar to use it). 
• Made it possible to copy urls of multiple selected tabs or a group
• Added auto light/dark theme based on system and browser setting 
• Made background image configuration free (was premium feature)
• Added ability to have separate dark and light saved presets

Previous updates:
• Made the extension save even more ram by adding native tab discarding (enabled by default)
• Added ability to drag to move tabs/groups between to other windows
• Made workspaces feature more reliable and performant
• Fully native suspending system which saves the most ram and gives you the most control
• Added the ability to assign a hotkey for a workspace
• Added setting to search all workspaces or single workspace
• Added ability to drag tab/group to workspace icon to move it there
• Added ability to rename and change the icon of all workspaces
• Added the Workspaces feature so you can categorize tabs easily (Enable it in settings)
• Hid the search bar by default but you can still search by just typing anywhere in the sidebar
• Numerous improvements & fixes implemented

Release notes are on the subreddit: /r/SharpTabs!

===== 🔥 Main Features 🔥 =====


✨ Useful AI Features (Free with bring your own Gemini key)

• Tab Grouping - Intelligently organize your tabs with a customizable prompt!
• Tab Cleanup - Looks and lists tabs you might want to close
• Group Naming - Create a group and it gets named automatically


🔍 Tab Search - Never lose track of your tabs again

• Instant Search - Start typing anywhere in the sidebar or popup for immediate 
results
• Easy Keyboard Navigation - Use arrow keys or tab/shift+tab to navigate in tabs list
• Quick search commands: Alt + T to open the pop up > Type > Select Tab > Enter


🌙 Tab Sleeping - Speed up your PC & keep tabs organized

• Auto-Suspend - Intelligently suspend tabs after a set inactivity time
• Smart Whitelist - Configure which sites/tabs to never suspend
• Rock Solid - Never breaks or loses any of your tabs (unlike others)


🎨 Complete Customization - Make the sidebar and popup look awesome!

• Tons of themes and background images/gradients possibilities
• Compatibility with tweakcn.com for unlimited themes
• Full Custom CSS customization allowed
• Compact pinned tabs mode (just shows them as icons)
• Complete customization of the context menu
• Slim Side Panel Mode + Expand on hover (for Vivaldi only)


💾 Session Backups - Never lose your tabs again!

• Auto-Backup - Automatic backups every 10 minutes when tabs change
• Granular Restore - Restore sessions, windows, groups, or individual tabs
• Cross-Browser - Easily export and import sessions between browsers
• Lightning Fast - Instant session restoration, faster than other extensions 


🏠 Workspaces - Categorize your tabs into different topics

• Easily create and reorganize the Workspaces
• Drag tabs and groups onto a workspace's icon to move them there
• Search in a single workspace or in all your workspaces (setting)


⌨️ Keyboard - Shortcuts Navigate your tabs like a pro

• Comprehensive Hotkeys - Extensive list of keyboard shortcuts for every action
• Go to Next & Previous Tab - Get work done faster!
• Customizable - Configure shortcuts to match your workflow

A lot more features and settings that I didn't mention here!
Notab: Vertical Tab and Group Manager
The World’s Best Vertical Tab and Group Manager!

✅ Notab is a tab and tab group management tool built on the principles of First Principle (FP). It is simple to use, with a clean interface, designed to boost productivity by reducing tab clutter and achieving a "No Tab" experience.

〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️〰️

⚫️ Focus on Your Starting Point  
How does First Principle work? By leveraging Chrome's tab group feature. When you search using a search engine in your browser, Notab automatically creates a tab group based on keywords. Any new tabs opened within this group are automatically assigned to it, helping you organize and focus with ease. Once you've found the information or answer you were looking for, you can close the group with a single click or save your research collection, keeping your workspace clear and orderly.

⚫️ My slogan is: Notab - but have groups!

⚫️ Notab Features:  
1. 🔹 Automatic Grouping: Every search creates a group based on keywords (if no group exists).  
2. 🔧 Tab Management: When Chrome's tab count gets overwhelming, making the interface unmanageable and laggy, Notab handles the clutter effortlessly.  
3. 📁 Tab Group Management: Notab creates groups and offers better group management for you.  
4. 🖥️ Interface:  
    4.1 🚀 Drag and Drop Sorting: Freely drag and sort between multiple windows, groups, and tabs.  
    4.2 👀 Multiple Views: Floating window, sidebar, and standalone window (adjustable and accessible anywhere). If you have multiple monitors, you can place the standalone window on your working screen, enabling easy control no matter which browser you're using.  
    4.3 🌓 Dark Mode.  
    4.4 🙈 Privacy Mode: Focus better with the sidebar while protecting your privacy.  
    4.5 🔎 Global Search: Manage all tabs and groups in one place.  
    4.6 ⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts: Quickly access the windows you need for tab management.  
    4.7 🔗 Global Copy Title-Link in Markdown Format: Easily copy from any page with a single click, supporting editor-friendly format.
    4.8 🌟 Bookmarks: Bookmark management has been supported since version 0.0.9

Monitors a student's browsing data and keeps them on task.

VCS Surelock is the Chromebook monitoring solution designed for Vancouver Christian School (https://vancs.org). Surelock helps teachers see the browsing activity of a student easily and securely.

Surelock's features are:

1. Seeing a student's full browsing history for the entire school year across all devices
2. Seeing a student's browsing activity in realtime
3. Running commands on a student's device in realtime such as:
       a. Opening, closing, and switching tabs
       b. Sending messages to the student's device
       c. Sending spoken messages to the student's device
       c. Locking the student's device
       d. Setting a tab limit for the student's device
       e. Creating quizzes/tests for the student (prevents student from using computer 
            until quiz/test ends)

These features make it easy for a teacher to protect students as they browse the web and it gives the teacher full control over the student's internet usage.

Nostr Signer Extension supporting multiple public / private key pairs.

Are you an advanced Nostr user?

AKA Profiles is a Nostr signing extension (NIP-07)  supporting  multiple public / private key pairs.

The primary purpose is enabling web apps to request the signing of events using the locally stored private key, thereby eliminating the need to give the private key to web apps.


Key Features
- Keeps your private key safe as local signing replaces sharing your private key
- Chose which public key to share per app request
- Each key pair has its own app permissions & preferred relays 
- most recent visits lets you jump back into to apps for current key
- supports NIP-07 including (signString() and .on('accountChanged'))
- supports NIP-04/44 encryption / decryption
- supports NIP-26 delegated event signing requests

Too many Chrome tabs? Keep every title readable in a horizontal tab bar with search, drag, groups, pins, and one-click switching.

Chrome shrinks your tabs into unreadable slivers once you open too many. You lose the title, lose the page, and eventually open the same tab again because finding it takes too long.

HorizantalTabs gives Chrome a horizontal scrollable tab bar. Every tab stays readable. Scroll with your mouse wheel, search instantly, drag to reorder, group tabs, pin tabs, and switch in one click.

Unlike session-first tab managers, HorizantalTabs is built for the tabs you are using right now.

A lightweight alternative to bulky tab managers — no saving sessions just to find the tab you already opened.

─── FREE FEATURES ───

• Horizontal scrollable tab strip — mouse wheel, no resizing
• Instant search — filter every open tab by title or URL in under a second
• Click to switch — one click activates any tab
• Drag and drop to reorder
• Multi-window view — see tabs from every Chrome window at once
• Tab groups — color-coded Chrome tab groups shown inline
• Pin and unpin from the tab bar
• Floating tab bar — overlay it on any page (Alt+H)
• Auto-hide bar — disappears when not in use, reappears on hover
• Right-click menu — pin, duplicate, mute, close others, close to right
• 7 theme modes — light, dark, auto, random, match tab, opposite, floating
• Tab count badge on the extension icon

─── WHO IT'S FOR ───

• Anyone who's said "I had it open a minute ago"
• Developers juggling docs, GitHub, Stack Overflow, and dev servers
• Writers and analysts tracking sources across windows
• Researchers and grad students with 30+ tabs open at any time


─── PRO FEATURES — $1.99/month ───

• Compact mode — pinned tabs collapse to favicons, fit 3× more on screen
• Multi-row layout — expand to 2 or 3 rows, see every tab at once
• Session manager — save and restore named tab sessions
• Workspaces — group tabs into named sets, switch contexts instantly
• Bulk actions — close duplicates, close by domain, close tabs older than 1, 3, 7, or 30 days
• Export URLs — copy every open tab URL to your clipboard
• Undo close — Ctrl+Z reopens the last closed tab
• Thumbnails — hover any tab to see a page screenshot
• Audio indicator — see which tabs are playing sound, mute in one click
• Purge all tabs — close everything and start fresh

─── KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS ───

Alt+A — open HorizantalTabs
Alt+H — toggle floating tab bar
Ctrl+Z — undo last closed tab (Pro)

─── PRIVACY ───

We can't see your tabs because we don't want to.

Tab titles and URLs are read locally and never transmitted. No analytics, no tracking, no ads. The only network request is Pro license verification — your email is checked against our license server when you upgrade.

───

HorizantalTabs — a horizontal tab manager for Chrome. Built by Algomittens LLC. Questions or feedback: horizantaltabs.com


 New features and bug fixes
 - Tab Effects, pulses, decay, and topography.
 - Various bug fixes.

Moly Tab Menu enables you to look up opening tabs and jump into one of them effortlessly. You can navigate between tabs using keyboard shortcuts and/or mouse scroll.

It is quick to jump into a recently opened tab because tabs are arranged in the activated order by default. Other sort orders are also available for better navigation according to use cases. You can also type some characters to filter tabs by its name.

It not only offers the opening tabs view but also recently closed tabs view and page history view. These views enable you to find and open whatever tabs/pages efficiently.

All keyboard shortcuts are customizable in the options page.
perc.pass is a simple and secure password management tool.

Designed for teams, companies, and individual users. It allows for the safe storage, organisation, and sharing of access data within project groups, ensuring complete control and privacy at every stage.

🔐 Maximum security

Due to advanced symmetric and asymmetric cryptography and the zero-knowledge principle, only you have access to your passwords. Your main password is never stored or transmitted to any servers, ensuring all your data remains entirely under your control.

📍 Compliance with RODO, NIS2 and DORA

Data is encrypted and securely stored in certified Polish Data Centers, complying with GDPR/RODO regulations and adhering to the latest NIS2 and DORA cybersecurity directives. 

⚡ Auto-fill and password generator

Our integrated browser plug-ins and mobile apps enable swift logins, auto-fill, and on-demand generation of strong passwords.

🔄 Shared entries and one-time links

Securely storing passwords, notes, and credit card information in one place allows for effortless data sharing, ensuring maximum protection and convenience while enhancing organization and team collaboration.

One-time, encrypted links enable swift and secure sharing of access data and notes with clients and subcontractors while eliminating risks and avoiding unnecessary complications.

📊 Security and activity monitoring

Safeguard your data with automatic password breach detection, enabling instant response to potential threats. Desaturates the icons in your tabs.

Set Chrome’s browser tab icons to grayscale (“black-and-white”).

Favicons—originally “favorites icons”—are the small icons that appear next to the page title inside a tab in Google Chrome.

Many companies choose to utilize this icon as a way to show off their logo or brand. As such, they’re often colorful and bold.

In an effort to provide a more minimalist, distraction-free, browsing experience, this extension desaturates the tab icons.

I offer a similar extension that desaturates all but the current “active tab” for each Chrome window. That app is called “Desaturate Favicons” and can be found here:
https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/desaturate-favicons/dkenplobjcbiljmfbgpbpaboipfgpcbm

The extension has no settings. There’s nothing to do. Just install it and it’ll start working right away. If you ever want the full color of icons to return, simply uninstall the extension.
View your history in a timeline format that shows time spent. Search through website contents as well as title and URL.

The only history manager that makes life easier, not harder.

______________________________________________

Tired of spending hours scrolling through Chrome history trying to find that one website you browsed two weeks ago? Getting frustrated sorting through endless irrelevant websites and irrelevant pop-up sites just to find that one article you viewed roughly two weeks ago? 

Introducing TimeTrace — your personalized database designed to help you navigate your browsing history like never before.

TimeTrace is a web extension that presents all of your browser history as an intuitive and informative timeline. Our extension not only allows you to see exactly how much time you’ve spent on each website and better understand your browsing habits, but it also allows you to search for the content of any site you've browsed. 

______________________________________________

Features include:
- A powerful search bar that allows you to search browsed website content in addition to site title and URL.
- A continuous timeline that shows all browser activity and time spent on each website.
- Timeline automatically folds URLs from the same domain together, with the option of hiding irrelevant browsing activity (hide sites visited for less than 5s).
- Easily go to any day that has browsing history and view your timeline.

______________________________________________

Upcoming features:

We are currently working on automatic AI summaries for timeline events.

In the near future, we will be offering an AI co-pilot that helps you find any content on any website you’ve ever browsed using TimeTrace.

______________________________________________

Data privacy:

TimeTrace does not store any user personal information. All user data are stored locally. For more information, please view our privacy policy: https://docs.google.com/document/d/12rHAdt82dFMD0kItUu2Y1aHOkg0b7LzJzEfgLlY5SIo/edit?usp=sharing
